content.problemStatement:
Given the time control of a chess match as a+ba + ba+b, determine which format of chess out of the given 444 it belongs to.

1)1)1) Bullet if a+b<3a + b \lt 3a+b<3

2)2)2) Blitz if 3≤a+b≤103 \leq a + b \leq 103≤a+b≤10

3)3)3) Rapid if 11≤a+b≤6011 \leq a + b \leq 6011≤a+b≤60

4)4)4) Classical if 60<a+b60 \lt a + b60<a+b


Input Format

First line will contain TTT, number of testcases. Then the testcases follow.
Each testcase contains a single line of input, two integers a,ba, ba,b.


Output Format
For each testcase, output in a single line, answer 111 for bullet, 222 for blitz, 333 for rapid, and 444 for classical format.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
TestCase 111: Since a+b=1<3a + b = 1 \lt 3a+b=1<3, it belongs to bullet format.
TestCase 222: Since 3≤(a+b=5)≤103 \leq (a + b = 5) \leq 103≤(a+b=5)≤10, it belongs to blitz format.
